seoTitle: Kiama Heights vs Kianga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kiama Heights and Kianga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kiama Heights vs Kianga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kiama Heights and Kianga.
heading: Kiama Heights vs Kianga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kiama Heights, New South Wales and Kianga, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kianga has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kiama Heights (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kiama Heights or Kianga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kiama Heights has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Kianga scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kiama Heights scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Kianga scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kiama Heights or Kianga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kianga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
